context.home_team: Home team (leading series 3-2, can clinch on home ice)
context.away_team: Away team (must win to force Game 7)
context.pre_match_notes: Stanley Cup Game 6. Home team can clinch. Clinch game on home ice — crowd intensity maximum. Away team facing elimination — maximum survival motivation. GSAx (Goals Saved Above Expected): home team goaltender +2.3 in the series; away team -0.4. Goaltender performance is primary NHL variable.

question: Predict Game 6 direction. Does the GSAx goaltender advantage or the away team elimination motivation dominate?

verified_outcome.score: Home team won and clinched Stanley Cup
verified_outcome.key_variable: GSAx_advantage + clinch_home_modifier — elite goaltender performance sustains under pressure
